creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192724
py-ciscoconfparse-1.3.15.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-ciscoconfparse to 1.3.15 . 

Changes by upstream:

- Fix Github issue #103, Python3 ccp_util imports 
- Attempt to fix unit tests
- Distribution change
- see also: https://github.com/mpenning/ciscoconfparse/blob/master/CHANGES

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
